records.title: Purchase requisition PR-1001
records.content: PR-1001 requests USD 24,500 for replacement laptops for the Operations team. Requester: Lin Chen. Vendor: Acme Supplies. Cost center: OPS-CC-10. Line item detail and split order check are present in local mock evidence. Quote evidence is intentionally missing for this case.

records.title: Vendor Acme Supplies
records.content: Acme Supplies is an active mock vendor. Supplier risk and sanctions checks are clear in local mock evidence.

records.title: Budget OPS-CC-10
records.content: Mock budget record for OPS-CC-10 shows remaining laptop refresh budget of USD 31,000 before PR-1001.

records.title: Purchase requisition PR-1002
records.content: PR-1002 requests USD 8,400 for replacement monitors for the support desk. Requester: Avery Zhou. Vendor: Contoso Office Supply. Cost center: IT-CC-20. Line item detail and split order check passed.

records.title: Vendor Contoso Office Supply
records.content: Contoso Office Supply is an active mock vendor. Supplier risk and sanctions checks are clear in local mock evidence.

records.title: Budget IT-CC-20
records.content: Mock budget record for IT-CC-20 shows remaining hardware refresh budget of USD 19,000 before PR-1002.

records.title: Quote Q-PR-1002-A
records.content: Fictional quote Q-PR-1002-A from Contoso Office Supply supports PR-1002 for USD 8,400.

records.title: Expense approval EXP-2001
records.content: EXP-2001 requests reimbursement of USD 842 for client travel. Receipt, business purpose, expense date, duplicate expense check, and amount limit check are present in local mock evidence.

records.title: Receipt EXP-2001
records.content: Fictional receipt for EXP-2001, amount USD 842, expense date 2026-04-12, purpose client travel.

records.title: Duplicate expense check EXP-2001
records.content: Local mock duplicate expense check for EXP-2001 is clear; no duplicate reimbursement request found.

records.title: Expense limit check EXP-2001
records.content: Local mock amount limit check shows EXP-2001 is within the ordinary manager review threshold.

records.title: Invoice payment INV-3001
records.content: INV-3001 requests payment of USD 18,000 to Northwind Components. Local evidence contains invoice INV-3001, PO-7788, GRN-8899, vendor record, payment terms, and duplicate payment check.

records.title: Vendor Northwind Components
records.content: Northwind Components is an active mock vendor with no onboarding block and no risk block in local mock evidence.

records.title: Purchase order PO-7788
records.content: PO-7788 is a mock purchase order for USD 18,000 matching Northwind Components and invoice INV-3001.

records.title: Goods receipt GRN-8899
records.content: GRN-8899 is a mock goods receipt showing the ordered components for PO-7788 were received and match invoice INV-3001.

records.title: Invoice INV-3001
records.content: Invoice INV-3001 is a mock invoice for USD 18,000 from Northwind Components and references PO-7788.

records.title: Payment terms INV-3001
records.content: Payment terms for INV-3001 are Net 30 and match the mock supplier terms.

records.title: Duplicate payment check INV-3001
records.content: Local mock duplicate payment check for INV-3001 is clear; no duplicate invoice or paid voucher found.

records.title: Supplier onboarding VEND-4001
records.content: VEND-4001 requests onboarding of BrightPath Logistics. Mock checks include tax form, banking, and sanctions screening status.

records.title: Vendor BrightPath Logistics
records.content: BrightPath Logistics is a mock vendor candidate. Tax and banking details are present; sanctions screening is pending legal/procurement confirmation.

records.title: Tax information VEND-4001
records.content: Fictional tax information is present for BrightPath Logistics.

records.title: Bank information VEND-4001
records.content: Fictional bank information is present for BrightPath Logistics.

records.title: Sanctions check VEND-4001
records.content: Sanctions screening for BrightPath Logistics is pending, so supplier onboarding cannot be recommended for approval.

records.title: Beneficial owner check VEND-4001
records.content: Fictional beneficial-owner evidence is present for BrightPath Logistics.

records.title: Procurement due diligence VEND-4001
records.content: Fictional procurement due-diligence evidence is present for BrightPath Logistics.

records.title: Contract exception CON-5001
records.content: CON-5001 requests an exception to standard liability terms for a customer contract. Legal review is required in mock policy context.

records.title: Contract CON-5001
records.content: Contract CON-5001 contains a mock non-standard liability cap, exception clause, payment terms, termination clause, standard terms comparison, and legal review requirement.

records.title: Budget exception BUD-6001
records.content: BUD-6001 requests a USD 55,000 budget exception for accelerated implementation support. Finance review is required.

records.title: Budget FIN-CC-77
records.content: Mock budget record for FIN-CC-77 shows insufficient uncommitted funds for BUD-6001 without finance exception approval.

records.title: Budget owner FIN-CC-77
records.content: Finance Ops is the mock budget owner for FIN-CC-77.

records.title: Approval matrix
records.content: Mock approval matrix: manager review is expected for normal requests; finance review for budget impact; procurement review for purchases and supplier onboarding; legal review for contract exceptions.

records.title: Procurement policy
records.content: Mock procurement policy: purchase requisitions require approval request, line items, vendor, supplier risk status, amount, cost center, business purpose, budget evidence, quote or price basis, approval matrix, and split order check before a pass recommendation can be considered.

records.title: Expense policy
records.content: Mock expense policy: reimbursement should include receipt evidence, business purpose, amount, department, requester, expense date, duplicate expense check, and exception review when policy evidence is incomplete.

records.title: Invoice/payment policy
records.content: Mock invoice/payment policy: payment review should compare purchase order, goods receipt, invoice, vendor identity, amount, payment terms, duplicate payment check, and approval authority.

records.title: Supplier onboarding policy
records.content: Mock supplier onboarding policy: onboarding should verify tax, banking, sanctions, ownership, and procurement due diligence before operational use.

records.title: Generic budget policy
records.content: Mock budget policy: budget exceptions or unclear funding require finance review and cannot be treated as final approval without human confirmation.
